form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after three months 2nd of 7 at this track on March 13 over 1207m, 0.5 len behind Nabokov carrying 55kg at $16.39. Previously second-up ran last of 7 at Keeneland on October 15 over 1207m, 13 len behind I Got No Munny with 55kg at $12.93. Sure to run well.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 49-day let-up. Most recently 3rd in a small field at this track on February 19 over 1408m, 9 len behind Radio Red with 56kg at $12.12. The start before that 2nd in a small field at this track on January 3 over 1207m, 1.5 len behind Funny Uncle with 56kg at $1.50. Has the ability to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Racing well recently. At the latest run won by a 0.3 len at this track March 13 over 1609m defeating Smallchangegeep with 57kg at $1.59. form.formComment: Last start 3rd of 9 at this track on March 21 over 1408m, 5 len behind Lotsa Trouble with 55kg at $8.47. The start before that settled back and ran on when 6th of 9 at this track on February 11 over 1609m, 14 len behind Aggregation carrying 55kg at $13.03. Happy enough to avoid.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. Comes off a 42 day let-up. First-up ran last of 8 at this track on February 5 over 1408m, 26 len behind Spirit Dragon with 56kg at $15.56. Second run from a spell ran last in a small field at this track on February 26 over 1207m, 8 len behind New York Scrappy carrying 56kg at $7.77. Form doesn't read well but he is a genuine contender.
